productDisplayName: Fossil Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch JR1353
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case, has a fixed bezel with markings, stainless steel backDial style: Black dial, has hour, minutes and seconds hands, markingsFeatures: Three-faced chronograph display, a date aperture, a screw and two press-buttons to reset the time and functionsStrap style: Silver-toned bracelet-style strap, secured with a butterfly claspWater-resistant up to 50 mComes in an authentic Fossil collectible tinWarranty: 2 years international warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects onlyWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
